overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a red-haired character in dark clothing walking through a snowy mountainous landscape. The scene features snow-covered terrain, rocky outcrops, wooden fences, and distant castle-like structures under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with rocky cliff

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the snowy path with rocky terrain on the left

entered.detail: large snow-dusted rock formation running along the left side of the path
snow-covered tall grass and vegetation extending to the right
traditional wooden post with hanging lantern visible ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy mountain trail with a large rocky cliff on the left and open frosted grassland on the right. A wooden lantern post appears ahead on the path, gradually moving to the left as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy path approaching wooden fence line

events.description: wooden fence comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy path as a wooden fence appears on the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running parallel to the path on the right
cluster of snow-laden trees visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward a wooden fence line that appears on the right, while the rocky cliff recedes into the distance on the left. Snow-covered trees become visible ahead as the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain path with wooden fencing

events.description: entering more densely wooded area with taller snow-covered trees

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the wooden fence through a more forested section of the trail

entered.detail: small snow-covered rocky outcrop on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a more densely vegetated area with snow-covered trees lining the path. The wooden fence continues on the right while the terrain becomes more forested, and another lantern post is passed on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley with distant castle spires

events.description: distant castle spires become visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: walking through open landscape toward distant castle structures visible ahead

entered.detail: tall gothic-style castle spires visible in the far distance on the left
snow-covered rocky hillside on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens into a wide snowy valley where distant castle spires become visible on the left horizon. The wooden fence and lantern posts are left behind as the character continues through the open terrain toward the distant structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain trail that gradually opens into a wide valley featuring distant architecture. It begins with the character walking between a towering rocky cliff and frosted grasslands, passing a wooden lantern post that shifts to the left as they advance. As the cliff recedes into the distance, the path leads toward a wooden fence line on the right and a cluster of snow-covered trees ahead. The scene then shifts into a more densely forested area where the character passes another lantern post while the fence continues to guide the way. Finally, the vegetation clears as the landscape expands into a vast snowy valley, revealing castle spires on the far horizon as the character leaves the fences and lanterns behind.
